title: disterigma cuspidatum
intro: Disterigma cuspidatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a shrub that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Disterigma cuspidatum has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, and can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its health benefits.
